Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: robert volz, esq., saad ahmad & associates, 510.713.9847, for creditor's trade association (assignee of plaintiff); No other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacates its tentative ruling after counsel presents proof of personal service of mr. shapers. ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC'S Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego (harlan b. shapers) as a judgment debtor is granted. Order signed in open Court.
